violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the front entrance and back stock room, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

The floors in back stock room has an accumulation of rodent droppings and soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

Inspector observed the floor drain in the back stock room to be uncovered and surrounded by accumulated debris and leaf litter. The area must be cleaned and the drain properly covered. New Violation. Correct By: 12/25/2025

Baby formula was observed expired with an expiration date of February 13 2024. Baby formula was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2024

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2024
